title: Twinkle Star 100LED 33FT/10M Copper Wire Fairy Lights 8 Modes LED String Lights USB Powered with Remote Control/Timer for Outdoor Indoor Christmas Tree Wedding Party Home Decoration, Warm White
features: Warm White Decorative String Lights: 10m 100 LED copper wire fairy lights are made from high quality copper wire. High quality bendable wire, you can build the shapes you want easily. This flexible design allows for extensive DIY applications, from decorating your garden to enhancing indoor spaces. Enjoy peace of mind knowing your lights can handle various creative projects.

Remote Control Christmas Lights: The remote effective range can reach to 5M at the longest distance. You can easily turn on/off the lights through the remote, set them in timer to auto on and off each day (6 hours ON, 18 hours OFF), adjust the brightness 25%/50%/75%/100%. Offering 8 stunning lighting modes to suit every occasion. From steady illumination to sparkling twinkles, you can easily customise your experience.

Waterproof & Safety: The wire parts of the christmas tree lights are fully sealed, thus making it submersible, but the USB is NOT waterproof, so please keep it away from water. With low voltage no overheat after many hours of usage, safe to touch after any hours of usage.

Lightweight and Twistable: Twinkle Star christmas lights indoor oudoor are lightweight and easy to move to any place you like. They can be easily twisted and wrapped around furniture and christmas/xmas tree to make your home cozier in festival.

Widely Applicable: The plug in copper wire string lights are a perfect choice for decorations of walls, Christmas trees, tents, furniture, etc. Its USB port allows you to apply the lights with USB adapter, power bank, cell phone charger or any other power source with USB interface.
description: Product Description Decorate your life and home with the Twinkle Star Fairy String Lights. Twinkle Star Fairy String Lights is made of 32ft/9.8m copper wire and 1ft/0.2m leading wire. Tangled by a card, it includes 100 led bulbs, the distance of two bulbs is 4 inches. You can use remote to turn on/off the lights, change modes, adjust brightness and set timer. Directly plug in/unplug it for power on/off and you can press the button on the USB to adjust 8 modes setting. Decorative Your Room Wrap copper string lights to any shape, such as words "dream"'I love you" to decorate your room or make a proposal. Make Twinkle Flower Wrap these copper lights to lights up these beautiful flowers or plants, to bring romantic atmosphere. DIY Night Lights Put these lights into glass bottle to make a light. Can be placed in anywhere you like. Decor Your Wall Put up these string lights to decorate wall curtain string lights. Let you enjoy to watch and stay in your private room.
